headline: CareCloud to acquire HFMA's MAP app for revenue cycle tracking
summary: CareCloud is set to acquire the Healthcare Financial Management Association's (HFMA) MAP App, a web-based revenue cycle tool. This acquisition aims to infuse AI capabilities into the tool and expand its reach to a broader network of hospitals, health systems, and physician practices. The deal, expected to close on October 1, 2025, aligns with CareCloud's strategy to extend its software-as-a-service tools and will enhance the MAP App for HFMA's 140,000 members.
label: negative

headline: These Penny Stocks are Soaring Today: DFLI, YCBD, PSTV
summary: This article highlights three penny stocks—DFLI, YCBD, and PSTV—that are experiencing significant gains due to recent news and developments. Dragonfly Energy (DFLI) is up following news of its presentation at a battery show and strong earnings. cbdMD (YCBD) surged after former President Trump's endorsement of CBD for senior healthcare, which also boosted other cannabis stocks. Plus Therapeutics (PSTV) continues to build momentum from its UnitedHealth agreement for national coverage of a cancer test.
label: negative

headline: Cigna will cover CT imaging artificial intelligence software nationwide
summary: Cigna announced it will cover CT imaging artificial intelligence software for plaque analysis nationwide, following a similar move by UnitedHealthcare. This decision, effective October 1st, will impact over 16 million Cigna members and increase access to AI assessments for over 61 million Americans when combined with existing coverage. Heartflow Inc., a key vendor in this space, also received FDA clearance for its next-generation plaque analysis algorithm and recently went public on Nasdaq.
label: negative
